import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import PhoneFrame from "../components/PhoneFrame"; const BULLETS_QUICK = ["Fastest option", "Auto optimized", "Editable later"]; const BULLETS_CUSTOM = ["Full control", "Flexible choices", "Change anytime"]; const ModeSelect = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
navigate("/")}>← Back travelblurry
{/* ── title block ── */}
Step 1 of 5

Choose how you'd like to plan your trip

Kolkata → Manali  •  5 days  •  ₹15,000

{/* ── card grid ── */}
{/* Card 1 — Quick Plan */}
navigate("/loading")}>
Recommended

Quick Plan

We'll automatically build the best trip within your budget.

    {BULLETS_QUICK.map(b => (
  • ✓{b}
    • ))}
{/* Card 2 — Customize */}
navigate("/travel")}>

Customize Step-by-Step

Choose transport, stay, food and local travel manually.

    {BULLETS_CUSTOM.map(b => (
  • ✓{b}
    • ))}
{/* ── bottom note ── */}

You can switch between modes anytime

 ); }; export default ModeSelect;
